metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for Google Workspace Logins
properties.query:
let GoogleWorkspaceLoginParser = (
    disabled: bool = false,
    pack: bool = false
)
{
    GWorkspace_ReportsAPI_login_CL
    | where not(disabled)
    | where event_type_s in ("login", "logout")
    | where event_name_s in (
        "login_success",
        "login_failure",
        "logout",
        "risky_sensitive_action_allowed",
        "risky_sensitive_action_blocked"
        )
    | extend
        EventVendor = "Google",
        Dvc = "Google Workspace",
        Challenges = iff(isempty(login_challenge_method_s), dynamic(["none"]), parse_json(login_challenge_method_s)),
        EventUid = _ItemId,
        EventProduct = "Google Workspace",
        EventSchema = "Authentication",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
        EventCount = int(1),
        EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
        EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
        EventMessage = case(
            event_name_s == "login_failure",
                strcat(actor_email_s, " failed to login."),
            event_name_s == "login_success",
                strcat(actor_email_s, " logged in."),
            event_name_s == "risky_sensitive_action_allowed",
                strcat(actor_email_s, " was allowed to attempt sensitive action: ", sensitive_action_name_s, ". This action might be restricted based on privileges or other limitations."),
            event_name_s == "risky_sensitive_action_blocked",
                strcat(actor_email_s, " wasn't allowed to attempt sensitive action: ", sensitive_action_name_s, "."),
            event_name_s == "logout",
                strcat(actor_email_s, " logged out."),
            ""
        ),
        EventType = case(
            event_name_s startswith_cs "login", "Logon",
            event_name_s == "logout", "Logoff",
            event_name_s startswith_cs "risky_sensitive_action", "Logon",
            ""
        ),
        EventResult = case(
            event_name_s in ("login_success", "risky_sensitive_action_allowed", "logout"), "Success",
            event_name_s in ("login_failure", "risky_sensitive_action_blocked"), "Failure",
            ""
        ),
        EventResultDetails = iff(
            event_name_s in ("risky_sensitive_action_blocked"),
            "Logon violates policy",
            "Other"
        ),
        TargetUsernameType = "UPN",
        TargetUserIdType = "Other",
        Src = IPAddress,
        SrcIpAddr = IPAddress,
        IpAddr = IPAddress
    | extend HasMFA = Challenges has_any (
        "security_key", "security_key_otp", "passkey", "userless_fido",
        "google_authenticator", "google_prompt", "device_prompt",
        "idv_preregistered_phone", "idv_any_phone", "backup_code",
        "offline_otp", "internal_two_factor", "cross_device", "web_approval"
        )
    | extend LogonMethod = case(
        HasMFA, "Multi factor authentication",
        login_type_s == "google_password", "Username & Password",
        "Other"
        ),
        LogonProtocol = case(
            login_type_s == "saml", "SAML",
            Challenges has_any ("saml"), "SAML",
            Challenges has_any ("oidc"), "OpenID Connect",
            "Other"
        )
    | project-rename
        EventOriginalUid = id_uniqueQualifier_s,
        TargetUserId = actor_profileId_s,
        TargetUsername = actor_email_s,
        SrcGeoCountry = networkInfo_regionCode_s,
        SrcGeoRegion = networkInfo_subdivisionCode_s
    | extend AdditionalFields = iff(
    pack == true,
    bag_merge(
        bag_pack(
            "LoginType", login_type_s,
            "LoginChallengeMethods", Challenges
        ),
        iff(
            isempty(sensitive_action_name_s),
            dynamic({}),
            bag_pack("SensitiveActionName", sensitive_action_name_s)
        )
    ),
    dynamic(null)
    )
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventMessage,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventType,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        LogonProtocol,
        LogonMethod,
        EventUid,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventCount,
        TargetUsername,
        TargetUsernameType,
        TargetUserId,
        TargetUserIdType,
        Dvc,
        Src,
        SrcIpAddr,
        IpAddr,
        SrcGeoCountry,
        SrcGeoRegion,
        AdditionalFields
};
GoogleWorkspaceLoginParser(
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
